summary: Tested P0 bug fix for proposal edit hydration. Backend API correctly saves and returns selected_extras and inter_city_transfers fields. Frontend TripBuilder correctly loads all saved data when editing a proposal including hotels, activities, transfers, inter-city transfers, and extras.

issues: Hotel address shows 'undefined, undefined' - minor display issue

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (<tr> cannot be child of <span>) in MyProposals.jsx - not blocking but should be fixed for cleaner React rendering
seed_data_creation: Created test proposals via API with selected_extras and inter_city_transfers fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: The P0 bug fix is verified working. Backend schemas (ProposalCreate, ProposalResponse) now include selected_extras and inter_city_transfers fields. The create_proposal route saves these fields to MongoDB. TripBuilder.jsx useEffect at line ~111 correctly hydrates all state including selectedExtras, interCityTransfers, activityVehicles, and transferVehicles from the data prop when isEditing is true.

frontend_edit_flow.hotels_hydrated: PASSED - Test Hotel with Deluxe room displayed
frontend_edit_flow.activities_hydrated: PASSED - City Tour with vehicle selection displayed
frontend_edit_flow.selected_extras_hydrated: PASSED - '+1 extra' indicator shown on activity

mocked_apis_note: Google Sheets sync, Stripe & PayPal payments, AI Trip Recommendations are MOCKED as per original spec
